title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural Hill County district (<200 students); no dedicated ECE staff. Superintendent is best contact. Email not surfaced publicly; pattern likely cheskett@covingtonisd.org but not confirmed. District office: 501 N Main St, Covington, TX 76636.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: San Antonio district with active Early Childhood Department under C&I (Pre-K 3 and 4 full day). Name of ECE Director not surfaced publicly; routed through C&I AsstSupt Melissa Casey. Email pattern at HISD typically first initial+last@harlandale.net (e.g., mcasey@harlandale.net) - not confirmed.

title: Superintendent
notes: Very small rural Panhandle district (~243 students, 1 campus PK-12). Superintendent is the sole admin contact for ECE decisions. Address: PO Box 408, Hartley, TX 79044.

title: District Curriculum & Instruction (Math Curriculum Specialist, C&I lead)
notes: District uses Frog Street Pre-K curriculum (confirmed). C&I dept listed: Dr. Veronica Sharp Weatherspoon (Math/C&I), Dr. Lauren Williams (HS English), Mr. Chris Greco (Science). Asst Supt is Travis Weatherspoon. No dedicated ECE Director.

title: Executive Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Mid-sized Panhandle district. Supt: Ralph Carter. C&I lead: Christopher Norton (Exec Dir C&I); Jana Price (Dir Innovation & Instruction); Jennifer Jolly also on C&I. Email pattern likely cnorton@herefordisd.net (unconfirmed). Address: 601 N 25 Mile Ave, Hereford, TX 79045.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural Nolan/Mitchell County district (~222 students) in Roscoe. NOTE: domain is hosted on esc14.net (ESC14 Region service center) BUT this is the official district domain for Highland ISD, not ESC staff. Superintendent is the right contact. Previous supt John Hyde succeeded by Steven Pyburn. Address: 6625 FM 608, Roscoe, TX 79545.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small Bell County district (~600 students PK-12). Superintendent announced retirement effective June 2025; successor may be in place by outreach time. PO Box 217, Holland, TX 76534.

notes: Grayson County district (~1,200 students PK-12). Doty oversees C&I, Federal Programs, District Testing, and Title IX since 2023. Address: 105 W Tutt St, Howe, TX 75459.

title: Superintendent
notes: Jackson County district (~1,170 students PK-12). Superintendent is primary contact; no dedicated ECE Director surfaced. Email pattern likely raschenbeck@industrialisd.org (unconfirmed). Address: 216 5th St, Vanderbilt, TX 77991.

title: P-20 Director
notes: Rural Pecos County 'Collegiate ISD' (P-20 model). P-20 Director Stacie Laramore oversees curriculum across all grades incl. ECE. Supt: Gary Laramore (gary.laramore@isisd.net). Email likely stacie.laramore@isisd.net (unconfirmed). Elementary Principal: Ashlee Allen.

title: Associate Superintendent of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Cherokee County district. Lisa Cox oversees curriculum, staff dev, SpEd, Languages, G/T, Health, Testing, Instructional Tech. Pre-K Dual Language program flagship at Fred Douglass Elementary. Email pattern likely lcox@jisd.org (unconfirmed). Address: 800 College Ave, Jacksonville, TX 75766.

title: Superintendent
notes: Taylor County CISD (Tuscola). NOTE: domain hosted on esc14.net but is official district domain, NOT ESC staff. Supt Glen Teal (newly named lone finalist 2024; succeeded Will Brewer). Chief Academic Officer role was posted - check for new hire. Email pattern likely gteal@jimnedisd.net or @jimned.esc14.net (unconfirmed).

title: Director (Curriculum/Special Programs)
notes: Kimble County rural district (~585 students). Supt: Ken Wimberley (ken.wimberley@junctionisd.net). Schulze listed as district director-level contact. Address: 1700 College St, Junction, TX 76849.

title: Superintendent
notes: Very small Wheeler County rural district (~140 students PK-12, one campus). Supt is sole admin contact for ECE. Address: 16703 FM 2697, Wheeler, TX 79096.

notes: Winkler County district. Kermit Elementary serves Pre-K through 5. Email pattern likely cschneider@kermitisd.org (unconfirmed). Address: 601 S Poplar, Kermit, TX 79745.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural Knox County CISD. Howeth is 2025 Region 9 Superintendent of the Year and TASB State Finalist - strong leader; no dedicated ECE director. Address: 606 E Main, Knox City, TX 79529.

notes: Tiny rural Brooks County district (~114 students, single PK-6 elementary). Superintendent serves dual role as principal. Email pattern likely lmartinez@lagloriaisd.net (unconfirmed). Address: 182 E County Rd 401, Falfurrias, TX 78355.

notes: On-base military district at Lackland AFB/JBSA. Two schools (Lackland Elementary PK-5; Stacey Jr-Sr High). Pre-K and PPCD programs at LES (~700 students). Dr. Hyde is the curriculum decision-maker.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small Houston County district (~496 students PK-12, one campus per level). No dedicated curriculum director. Woodard previously at Crockett ISD/Zavalla ISD/Livingston ISD. Email pattern likely mwoodard@latexoisd.net (unconfirmed).

title: Superintendent
notes: Leon County rural district (~700 students PK-12) in Jewett. Established 1959. Superintendent is best contact for ECE decisions. Email pattern likely drains@leonisd.net (unconfirmed). Address: 12168 Hwy 79 W, Jewett, TX 75846.

notes: Texarkana-area district. Has dedicated Early Childhood Center (LE ECC, ~323 students PK-K). Supt: Ronnie Thompson. LE ECC could also be approached directly. Address: 2901 Leopard Dr, Texarkana, TX 75501.

notes: Llano County 'A'-rated district. Payne is Asst Supt (encompasses C&I); no separately-named curriculum director publicly. LES PK-5 principal: Mrs. Stubblefield. Email pattern likely jpayne@llanoisd.org (unconfirmed).

notes: Mid-large Cameron County district (~10K students, 14 schools, full-day Pre-K since 2020). Dr. Tudon oversees curriculum. Email pattern likely stundon@lfcisd.net or sara.tudon@lfcisd.net (unconfirmed).

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Caldwell County district (~1,426 students PK-12). Asst Supt C&I oversees athletics, tech, SpEd, federal/state programs. Email pattern likely afredo@lulingisd.net (unconfirmed). Address: 115 W Bowie St, Luling, TX 78648.

title: Director of Early Childhood
notes: Growing Travis County district in Austin metro. NAEYC-accredited Child Development Center. Dedicated ECE Director role - top priority persona. Holds MA from Texas State.

notes: Falls County district under TEA Board of Managers. Leadership transition: Supt Darryl Henson resigned June 2025; Norman Jones acting supt; Alphonso Bates named lone finalist Oct 2025. Woodson's current status unconfirmed (may have moved on). Tamika Washington = Director of Academics. Innovative TEA-aligned Pre-K classrooms.

title: Superintendent

notes: Wood County district. Foster oversees C&I; supported by Kara Ledkins (District Curriculum Specialist, 903-569-5338). Mineola Primary School serves the youngest grades.
